justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified that the initial dates provided by the user were in the past and then accurately processed the subsequent date and time requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to provide new dates or times without offering alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had to ask the user to provide new dates multiple times, leading to several turns where no progress was made on finding an appointment.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt a bit like a back-and-forth guessing game, as the agent repeatedly reported unavailability without proactively suggesting alternatives.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by asking for new dates but did not intelligently expand the search or offer alternatives, instead relying on the user to provide new options.
